title: cynosurus elegans subsp. paradoxus
intro: Cynosurus elegans subsp. paradoxus, also known as False Cockscomb or Wild Pansy, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include soothing irritated throats, relieving congestion, and providing antioxidant properties that help protect against cell damage. The herbal preparations of Cynosurus elegans subsp. paradoxus typically involve making infusions, decoctions, or tinctures from the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat various health issues.
